commit_scope: fourth-kernel.form m4e2 — the arena heap and axiom-1's nothing, first-class: CONS/HEAD/TAIL over a bump arena with references as values (the node ack), NIL as THE absence (empty list and nothing one ground state, reached through its op), len/sum as walked recipes through the universal binary, and BMF fail returning NOTHING so a matched zero is honest data — the offer ack vocabulary {nothing, 0, 1, node} complete in the emitted sibling. Band three-way at 15; runtime witnessed in the audit.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-heap-band.fk
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/minimal-surface.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker.fk form-stdlib/fourth-walker-emit.fk form-stdlib/tests/fourth-os-band.fk
local_validation.summary: fourth-heap-band holds three-way at 15: CONS(LIT 5, NIL) flattens with NIL as an op row (the absence reached structurally — discovered the hard way: intern_trivial_int is 32-bit, a big sentinel literal truncates to garbage and the NIL-test never fires; the op shape is the honest fix and the range constraint is now named); HEAD(TAIL(ARG)) chains unary; the universal emission is 3620 bytes deterministic; the jit emission 3535. The audit witnessed the runtime half: 3*len + sum over [7,8,9] = 33 through the universal binary (len and sum are walked recipes via CALL over the doors); the honest-ack matcher returned a REAL matched zero for source '0' and NOTHING (the sentinel) for source 'z' — fail and zero no longer collide. fourth-os-band re-pinned and re-proven; full audit green end to end including all prior sections.

observed_delta.ack_vocabulary: {nothing, 0, 1, node} physical: nothing = NIL sentinel, node = arena ref
observed_delta.found_bug: intern_trivial_int truncates beyond 32-bit — the sentinel must be an op, never a literal

known_limitations.limitation: The arena is bump-only — no melt/GC; axiom-3's nothing-overwritten as a feature until compaction earns its place by a real workload.
known_limitations.follow_up: Arena watermark in the probe when list workloads grow; compaction lands champion-challenger style if ever needed.

known_limitations.limitation: Program literals ride intern_trivial_int (32-bit range); values needing more bits must be computed or reached through ops (as NIL is).
known_limitations.follow_up: A tagged value ABI (m4e4 territory) lifts the range honestly; until then the constraint is named in band and spec.

known_limitations.limitation: References use a range-tag (values >= 1e15 are refs) rather than a tagged ABI — band programs keep ints below the base.

ci_validation.summary: PR gates run the fourth-kernel bands three-way.

deploy_validation.summary: form-stdlib additions ride the api image rebuild; the lattice ingests the updated fourth-kernel.form on the post-merge hook.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: No route behavior changes. The fourth sibling gains structure: lists in an arena, recipes walking them, and the complete offer ack vocabulary — fail is nothing, zero is data, references are node-acks. The band-subset's structural half is in place for m4e3's real-recipe flattener.
test_flows: fourth-heap-band pins NIL-as-op flatten, unary chains, and both emission lengths, three-way at 15.
fourth_kernel_audit.sh section 12: lists + len/sum recipes return 33; matched-zero vs nothing distinct on real byte streams.
e2e_validation.summary: validate.sh both bands 1 ok 0 divergent; audit end-to-end heap + honest acks.

phase_gate.gate: lists walked by recipes and the complete ack vocabulary witnessed; CI three-way + deploy ingest confirm the crossing
phase_gate.next: m4e3 — the real-recipe flattener through the observe door onto the cursor + heap; the band ratchet's first click
